channel.title: xai_rss LLM release feed
channel.description: Functional releases and updates for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor collected from X.

item.title: Claude Code用Codexプラグイン
item.description: summary: New open-source Codex plugin for Claude Code enables task delegation and code reviews using ChatGPT subscription. Install: github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc. Supports parallel background tasks via Codex app server. tool: codex update_type: new_feature canonical_author: @dkundel source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 98 source_reason: @dkundel is OpenAI employee focused on DevX and Codex, consistent accurate announcements urgency_reason: OpenAI Codex team announcing new plugin release integrating with Claude Code, early insider info related_sources: - https://x.com/dkundel/status/2038670330257109461

item.title: Claude Codeにコンピュータ使用追加
item.description: summary: Computer use feature now in Claude Code: Claude can open apps, interact with UI, and test built code directly from CLI. Available in research preview on Pro and Max plans for macOS. Enable with /mcp. Docs: code.claude.com/docs/en/computer-use. tool: claude_code update_type: preview canonical_author: @claudeai source_classification: official source_confidence: 100 source_reason: Posted directly by @ClaudeAI, core official account for Anthropic's Claude urgency_reason: Official announcement of major new capability in research preview, high impact for developers related_sources: - https://x.com/claudeai/status/2038663014098899416
